projects.name: Sentiment Analysis Tool
projects.summary: Fine-tuned BERT model for sentiment classification on 80,000 tweets. Processed data with PyTorch and NumPy, stored results in PostgreSQL. Demonstrates NLP expertise and large-scale data handling.

projects.name: Real-Time Chat App
projects.summary: Full-stack real-time messaging application with Node.js backend and React frontend. Implemented WebSockets and Redis pub/sub for live messaging. Deployed on AWS EC2 with Docker containerization and CI/CD automation via GitHub Actions.

impact_highlights.description: Processed and fine-tuned BERT model on 80,000 tweets for sentiment classification, demonstrating ability to handle large-scale NLP datasets.
Deployed Real-Time Chat App to production on AWS EC2 with Docker containerization and automated CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions.
Built and deployed REST API using Flask to GCP Cloud Run during internship, demonstrating cloud deployment capabilities.
impact_highlights.metric: REST API deployed to GCP Cloud Run
